b:T7eca,<div class="specification">
<p>The diagram shows rays of light entering the eyes from point Q in the right visual field.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Draw a ray of light entering the left eye from point P. </p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Information about the light from P entering the left eye is processed in the brain.</p>
<p>State what region of the brain would process the information.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Information about the light from P entering the left eye is processed in the brain.</p>
<p>State the side of the brain that would process the information.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State the type of cell in the retina which directly transmits impulses through the optic nerve to the brain.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>c:T27be4,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p>Any straight line from P passing through the lens to the retina of left eye.</p>
<p> </p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>visual cortex/occipital lobe;</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>right;</p>
<p><br/><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br/><br/></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>ganglion (cell);</p>
<p><br/><br/></p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/a/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","a"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"20N.3.SL.TZ0.5"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"20N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","a-2-the-human-brain"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>This question on the eye was well answered though there was some confusion between ganglion and bipolar cells.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.i.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.ii.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
